scienceTitle: FSRS - The smartest review algorithm today
spacedRepetitionDescription: is a review method based on the "forgetting curve" - you only review when about to forget, saving up to 90% of time.
fsrsAlgoDescription: is a next-generation algorithm, 1.5x more accurate than Anki in predicting when you're about to forget.
mlAlgoDescription: in our system learns from your behavior - response time, accuracy, study time - to adjust the algorithm specifically for you.

faqSubtitle: Answers to common questions about our method and application
faq1Question: What is FSRS and how is it different from Anki?
faq1Answer: FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) is a next-generation algorithm developed by the open-source community. Research shows FSRS is about 1.5x more accurate than Anki's SM-2 algorithm in predicting when you'll forget information.
faq2Question: How long do I need to study each day?
faq2Answer: Just 15-30 minutes per day is enough. The key is consistent daily practice, not cramming. The system will automatically adjust the workload to fit your available time.
faq3Question: Is the app suitable for beginners?
faq3Answer: Absolutely! The system will assess your level through an initial test and create a suitable learning path. Whether you're a beginner or advanced, AI will personalize content for you.
faq4Answer: Definitely! We use end-to-end encryption and don't share personal data with third parties. You have full control and can delete your data at any time.
